title: ZeroPress Theme Preview Data v0.5
description: ZeroPress theme preview payload. v0.5 is data-only and may include optional menus, widget areas, and named collections for themes.
markdownDescription: ZeroPress theme preview payload. `v0.5` is data-only and may include optional menus, widget areas, and named collections for themes.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling. ZeroPress core does not interpret this value.
$schema.markdownDescription: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling. ZeroPress core does not interpret this value.

generator.description: Identifier of the generator that produced this payload.
generator.markdownDescription: Identifier of the generator that produced this payload.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the payload was generated.
generated_at.markdownDescription: UTC timestamp when the payload was generated.

slugSegment.description: A single safe URL path segment. Unicode is allowed, but path separators, percent-encoding, control characters, whitespace-only values, and reserved dot segments are not.
slugSegment.markdownDescription: A single safe URL path segment. Unicode is allowed, but path separators, percent-encoding, control characters, whitespace-only values, and reserved dot segments are not.

previewMeta.description: Generator-defined optional metadata for site/theme conventions. ZeroPress core does not interpret metadata keys.
previewMeta.markdownDescription: Generator-defined optional metadata for site/theme conventions. ZeroPress core does not interpret metadata keys.

permalinks.description: Optional site permalink policy used by build tooling to derive public URLs and output paths.
permalinks.markdownDescription: Optional site permalink policy used by build tooling to derive public URLs and output paths.

permalinkPattern.description: Absolute URL path pattern using full-segment tokens such as :slug or :public_id. Literal .html suffixes are not part of v0.5.
permalinkPattern.markdownDescription: Absolute URL path pattern using full-segment tokens such as `:slug` or `:public_id`. Literal `.html` suffixes are not part of `v0.5`.

frontPage.description: Optional root front page selection policy.
frontPage.markdownDescription: Optional root front page selection policy.

page_slug.description: Page slug used when type is page.

html.description: Trusted full HTML used when type is standalone_html.
html.markdownDescription: Trusted full HTML used when `type` is `standalone_html`.

enabled.description: Whether the site requests a post index route.
enabled.markdownDescription: Whether the site requests a post index route.

paginate.description: Whether the post index should generate page 2+ routes.
paginate.markdownDescription: Whether the post index should generate page 2+ routes.

postIndexPath.description: Absolute public path for the post index route. Use / for the site root.
postIndexPath.markdownDescription: Absolute public path for the post index route. Use `/` for the site root.

pagePath.description: Optional relative page route path. No leading or trailing slash; each segment follows the slug segment policy.
pagePath.markdownDescription: Optional relative page route path. No leading or trailing slash; each segment follows the slug segment policy.

mediaDeliveryMode.description: Optional media delivery capability. media_domain means media URLs under site.mediaBaseUrl support ZeroPress image variant query parameters.
mediaDeliveryMode.markdownDescription: Optional media delivery capability. `media_domain` means media URLs under `site.mediaBaseUrl` support ZeroPress image variant query parameters.

indexing.description: Optional fallback robots.txt indexing policy. Missing or true allows indexing in the generated fallback robots.txt; false disallows all agents in the fallback robots.txt.
indexing.markdownDescription: Optional fallback `robots.txt` indexing policy. Missing or `true` allows indexing in the generated fallback `robots.txt`; `false` disallows all agents in the fallback `robots.txt`.

siteFavicon.description: Optional site favicon links for HTML head output.
siteFavicon.markdownDescription: Optional site favicon links for HTML `<head>` output.

siteFooter.description: Optional site footer display data for themes.
siteFooter.markdownDescription: Optional site footer display data for themes.

copyright_text.description: Theme-facing footer copyright or legal text. ZeroPress does not add a copyright symbol automatically.
copyright_text.markdownDescription: Theme-facing footer copyright or legal text. ZeroPress does not add a copyright symbol automatically.

siteFooterAttribution.description: Optional ZeroPress attribution display policy for themes.
siteFooterAttribution.markdownDescription: Optional ZeroPress attribution display policy for themes.

enabled.description: When false, themes that support ZeroPress attribution should hide it. Missing or true means attribution may be shown.
enabled.markdownDescription: When `false`, themes that support ZeroPress attribution should hide it. Missing or `true` means attribution may be shown.

src.description: Managed media source URL or path. Matches existing media fields such as featured_image or avatar after renderer normalization.
src.markdownDescription: Managed media source URL or path. Matches existing media fields such as `featured_image` or `avatar` after renderer normalization.

menuItem.description: Theme-facing navigation item. Children may be nested to any depth.
menuItem.markdownDescription: Theme-facing navigation item. `children` may be nested to any depth.

title.description: Display title shown by the theme.
title.markdownDescription: Display title shown by the theme.

url.description: Resolved absolute URI or safe relative path.
url.markdownDescription: Resolved absolute URI or safe relative path.

type.description: Origin type of the menu item.
type.markdownDescription: Origin type of the menu item.

target.description: Link target semantics for the theme.
target.markdownDescription: Link target semantics for the theme.

menu.description: A named enabled menu exported to themes under its menu_id key.
menu.markdownDescription: A named enabled menu exported to themes under its `menu_id` key.

name.description: Human-readable menu name for development and diagnostics.
name.markdownDescription: Human-readable menu name for development and diagnostics.

items.description: Resolved menu tree after omission of missing references.
items.markdownDescription: Resolved menu tree after omission of missing references.

widgetItem.description: Theme-facing widget item shell. Widget-type-specific settings are intentionally left open in v0.5.
widgetItem.markdownDescription: Theme-facing widget item shell. Widget-type-specific `settings` are intentionally left open in `v0.5`.

title.description: Display title shown by the theme.
title.markdownDescription: Display title shown by the theme.

settings.description: Widget-type-specific settings payload. This object is intentionally schema-light in v0.5.
settings.markdownDescription: Widget-type-specific settings payload. This object is intentionally schema-light in `v0.5`.

widgetArea.description: A named enabled widget area exported to themes under its widget_area_id key.
widgetArea.markdownDescription: A named enabled widget area exported to themes under its `widget_area_id` key.

name.description: Human-readable widget area name for development and diagnostics.
name.markdownDescription: Human-readable widget area name for development and diagnostics.

items.description: Resolved widget item list after omission of disabled or missing-reference items.
items.markdownDescription: Resolved widget item list after omission of disabled or missing-reference items.

widgets.description: Enabled widget areas keyed by widget_area_id. Disabled widget areas are omitted.
widgets.markdownDescription: Enabled widget areas keyed by `widget_area_id`. Disabled widget areas are omitted.

collectionItem.description: A reference to a page or post included in a named collection.
collectionItem.markdownDescription: A reference to a page or post included in a named collection.

collection.description: A named curated content list exported to themes under its collection id.
collection.markdownDescription: A named curated content list exported to themes under its collection id.

title.description: Optional display title for the collection.
title.markdownDescription: Optional display title for the collection.

description.description: Optional helper text for the collection.
description.markdownDescription: Optional helper text for the collection.

collections.description: Named curated content lists keyed by collection id.
collections.markdownDescription: Named curated content lists keyed by collection id.

content.description: Raw CSS source to be consumed by build tooling.
content.markdownDescription: Raw CSS source to be consumed by build tooling.

customHtml.description: Optional trusted site-level HTML injection slots.
customHtml.markdownDescription: Optional trusted site-level HTML injection slots. ZeroPress does not sanitize or interpret the HTML content.

content.description: Trusted raw HTML inserted into the target slot by build tooling.
content.markdownDescription: Trusted raw HTML inserted into the target slot by build tooling.

menus.description: Enabled menus keyed by menu_id. Disabled menus and absent menu_ids are omitted.
menus.markdownDescription: Enabled menus keyed by `menu_id`. Disabled menus and absent `menu_id`s are omitted.

posts.title: Hello ZeroPress
posts.content:
# Hello ZeroPress

Welcome to the example post.

cover-story.title: Cover Story
cover-story.description: Curated content for a featured area.
